majors.count_method: counted unique Yale College major entries (B.A./B.S.) on the official Yale catalog page 'Majors in Yale College'
majors.notes: counted unique Yale College major entries (B.A./B.S.) on the official Yale catalog page 'Majors in Yale College'

admissions.testing_policy: Yale uses a test-flexible policy that requires first-year applicants to submit scores from one or more of the following: ACT, AP, IB, or SAT.
admissions.gpa_policy: Yale does not publish a minimum GPA on the cited admissions pages.
admissions.course_rigor: The cited Yale admissions pages do not provide a single minimum course-rigor formula.
admissions.recommendations: Yale requires letters of recommendation from two teachers and one counselor, plus a school report with transcript.
admissions.essays: Yale requires Yale-specific short essays for first-year applicants.

projects_research: Yale allows applicants to submit supplementary material showcasing STEM research.

evidence.source_excerpt: A phase-4 count of unique B.A./B.S. entries on Yale's official 'Majors in Yale College' page yielded 81 majors; the Yale admissions page also says students can choose from over 80 majors.

evidence.claim: Yale uses a test-flexible policy that requires first-year applicants to submit scores from one or more of the following: ACT, AP, IB, or SAT.
evidence.source_excerpt: Yale's test-flexible policy requires applicants to submit scores from one or more of the following exams: ACT, AP, IB, or SAT.

evidence.claim: Yale requires letters of recommendation from two teachers and one counselor, plus a school report with transcript.
evidence.source_excerpt: Letters of recommendation from two teachers and one counselor School Report with transcript Standardized test results (ACT, AP, IB or SAT).

evidence.claim: Yale requires Yale-specific short essays for first-year applicants.
evidence.source_excerpt: First-year applicants complete Yale-specific short essays. Review the 2025-2026 essay topics for all applications.

evidence.claim: Yale allows applicants to submit supplementary material showcasing STEM research.
evidence.source_excerpt: Supplements Applicants may submit supplementary material showcasing Visual Art, Dance, Music, Film, or STEM research.

warnings: Phase 4 structured upgrade applied to top-10 expansion schools.
